text: v0.1 dense core complete: crossProject JVM/JS build, platform DoubleArray/FloatArray/IndexArray storage, DVec/DMat views/slices/transpose, dot/norm/axpy/gemv/gemm pure kernels, layout-specialized gemv paths, Mat2/Mat3/Mat4 tiny kernels, MUnit/ScalaCheck tests, JVM JMH skeleton, and Scala.js benchmark smoke runner. Evidence: sbt testAll, sbt benchCompile, sbt benchSmokeJS.
